events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need diagnose most likely fault for plastic shrinkage cracks in concrete finishing/curing, in-service. Need decision pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since observed plastic shrinkage cracks, likely non-compliant/defective. Work stage in-service. Component condition degraded maybe failed? Plastic shrinkage cracks are typically surface cracks due to rapid evaporation of bleed water before setting, inadequate curing, wind, low humidity, high temp, poor finishing practices. In-service cracks could allow ingress, corrosion, durability issue. Need risk maybe medium/high depending industrial. Decision fail because non-compliant/defective? The task says if dangerous or non-compliant, decision must be fail. Cracks indicate non-compliant with ACI 302/308 finishing/curing. So fail.

Need fill fields. percent_complete 100 (in-service). value 0. sound_source empty? Not audio. event_time 0, rate 0. order empty. workable empty. findings: plastic shrinkage cracking due to excessive evaporation rate/bleed water loss, inadequate curing/finishing. actions: evaluate crack width/depth, repair per engineer (epoxy injection, sealing), review curing protocol, wind screens, evaporation retardant, fog misting, timing of final finish. rationale: rapid moisture loss before final set causing tensile stresses exceeding concrete strength; ACI 308 curing and ACI 302 finishing requirements. references: ACI 302.1R, ACI 308.1R.

Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

  "decision": "fail",

  "findings": [
    "Plastic shrinkage cracking observed on concrete surface",
    "Cracking indicates rapid loss of surface moisture before final set",
    "Inadequate curing and/or finishing practices per ACI 302/308"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Measure crack widths/depths and assess structural/durability impact",
    "Repair cracks per engineer-approved method (e.g., epoxy injection or approved sealant)",
    "Review and enforce evaporation control: windscreens, fog misting, evaporation retarder",
    "Ensure timely final finishing and immediate curing commencement after final set",
    "Verify mix bleed characteristics and ambient conditions against ACI 302/308 limits"
  ],
  "rationale": "Plastic shrinkage cracks form when the evaporation rate exceeds the rate of bleed water reaching the surface, causing tensile stresses in the still-plastic concrete before it gains sufficient strength. This is a classic curing/finishing defect tied to hot, windy, or low-humidity conditions and delayed or inadequate curing, violating ACI 302 finishing and ACI 308 curing guidance.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 302.1R - Guide for Concrete Floor and Slab Construction",
    "ACI 308.1R - Guide to External Curing of Concrete"
  ]
}
